configuration.centralvintage.enableBlaze: Whether fermenting jars placed on a Create: Central Kitchen blaze stove ferment faster based on the stove heat level.
configuration.centralvintage.normalBurni: Fermenting speed multiplier when the blaze stove is normally burning. Matches Create: Central Kitchen's FADING/KINDLED blaze status.
configuration.centralvintage.seethingFer: Fermenting speed multiplier when the blaze stove is super-heated.
block.vintagedelight.fermenting_jar.tool: Fermenting Jars can be placed on _Blaze Stoves_ like Cooking Pots to _speed up pickling_.
centralvintage.ponder.fermenting_jar.tex: Fermenting Jars now have a few new features
When there is a suitable container diagonally below...
Like a Basin, it will also create an output
Pickled products will drop from this output into the matching container
centralvintage.ponder.tag.ponderer_expor: This mod's Ponder scenes were created and exported with The Ponderer. Learn more: https://modrinth.com/mod/the-ponderer
